title: Pod Security, Security Contexts, Images, Admission, Secrets, and Multi-Tenancy · Platform-System Defense
summary: A release review compares fresh pod security, security contexts, images, admission, secrets, and multi-tenancy choices and accepts only answers tied to observable API, controller, workload, network, storage, or policy evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for restricted workload and admission policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply Privileged, Baseline, and Restricted Pod Security Standards with enforce, audit, warn, version pinning, exemptions, namespace labels, and rollout evidence.
Set non-root identity, groups, filesystem ownership, read-only root, capabilities, privilege escalation, seccomp, host namespaces, devices, and writable mounts from threat evidence.
Require immutable images, provenance, signatures, vulnerability policy, registry allowlists, architecture, pull credentials, and admission decisions with exceptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Pod Security Standards Admission · changed case · Quiz K8s Pod Security Standards Admission
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Pod runs as root, is privileged, adds capabilities, mounts hostPath, permits privilege escalation, and bypasses a namespace policy exception. Enforce Pod Security, securityContext, seccomp, admission, exception ownership, and residual shared-kernel risk.

Which action demonstrates K8s Pod Security Standards Admission without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: K8s Pod Security Standards Admission · changed case · Quiz K8s Pod Security Standards Admission.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for apply privileged, baseline, and restricted pod security standards with enforce, audit, warn, version pinning, exemptions, namespace labels, and rollout evidence. For K8s Pod Security Standards Admission · changed case · Quiz K8s Pod Security Standards Admission, keep K8s Pod Security Standards Admission connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.
